message:
test: add 116 unit tests for permissions, error hints, and extension license

- permissions.rs: 31 new tests covering days_to_ymd date math, PersistedDecision
  serde, corrupt file handling, expiry in lookup, parent directory creation,
  multiple capabilities, file permissions, multi-session persistence
- error_hints.rs: 39 new tests covering all untested branches: config models.json,
  session corrupted/locked, auth OAuth/lock, provider server error/model not found,
  tool write/edit/bash/grep, validation required/type, extension not found/manifest,
  io NotFound/AlreadyExists, json data errors, api 401/403/404, format edge cases
- extension_license.rs: 46 new tests covering all license content detection paths
  (ISC/BSD2/BSD3/GPL2/AGPL3/LGPL21/MPL2/Unlicense/CC0), SPDX variant parsing,
  security pattern scanning for all 11 patterns, screening pipeline edge cases,
  serde round-trips for all enum types
- Fix clippy errors in ext_conformance_negative.rs (raw string hashes, redundant clones)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
